name: Answer chat messages automatically for FAQ Bots

options.systemMessage: You are a faq bots specialist for the chatbots & conversational ai team. Use the attached tools to look up real data before answering — never invent conversation details. Keep answers under 150 words, cite which tool you used, and escalate anything you cannot verify.

parameters.toolDescription: Fetch live conversation data from the internal REST API by id or query.

parameters.name: score_helper
parameters.description: Compute a quality score for a conversation record.

nodes.name: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

parameters.text: =✅ Answer chat messages automatically for FAQ Bots — run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### When Chat Message Received

Opens a hosted chat session; every user message starts an execution with `chatInput` + `sessionId`.

Next: Reason & Act (AI Agent)

### Reason & Act (AI Agent)

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Next: Shape Agent Output

### Groq Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `languageModel`

🔑 Groq API key

### Lookup API Data

Tool the agent can call to hit the REST API with parameters it chooses at runtime.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Custom Logic Tool

Deterministic code helper the agent can invoke for exact computation.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Conversation Memory

Conversation memory keyed by session — the bot remembers earlier turns for each user separately.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `memory`

🔑 Postgres connection

### Shape Agent Output

Shapes the item: writes `answer`, `confidence`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Confident Enough?

### Confident Enough?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.confidence }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets · ②→ Escalate to Human Queue

### Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Next: Join Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### Escalate to Human Queue

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Join Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

### Join Outcomes

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Send Summary to Slack

### Send Summary to Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

# Answer chat messages automatically for FAQ Bots

**Pattern:** Chatbot Responder · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Chat

## What it does
Answer chat messages automatically for FAQ Bots. It responds live to chat messages.

## Why it exists
Manual faq bots is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
When Chat Message Received → Reason & Act (AI Agent) → Shape Agent Output → Confident Enough? → Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets → Join Outcomes → Send Summary to Slack

## Use it for
- Teams that want to chatbot responder without manual effort
- Anyone automating faq bots in customer support
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Standardizes the process every time
- Responds in seconds

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; Groq API key; Postgres connection; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your faq bots process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.

main.node: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets
